scope: Cold-visitor clarity, trust, navigation, visual hierarchy, responsive form and live catalog destination for the golden slice.
findings: Product, audience and public-life outcome are understandable within the first viewport.
Primary action is prominent and its click receipt reaches the live catalog landmark without a semantic error.
Demo and changing catalog inventory are bounded honestly; expired proof fails closed.
390px and 320px layouts preserve public-before-auth order and attention hierarchy.
residuals: Verdict covers the golden slice only; record anatomy, adjacent routes and final auth handoff require full-build acceptance.
The current product says actions are temporarily unavailable, so final copy may promise browsing but not participation.
